Off Calendar Jan-24-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Order To Show Cause And Temporary Restraining Order Re Preliminary Injunction.

OFF CALENDAR. All proceedings in this litigation have been stayed pursuant to the joint stipulation and order regarding stay of proceedings entered December 31, 2018.
